invariant: list_open_loops and commitment extraction exclude commitments whose TTL has expired while preserving stale provenance.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = the expired commitment is absent from active loops and appears only as an excluded stale commitment.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds one expired open_loop claim with explicit TTL metadata.
fixture_design_notes.external_replay: Pins the transcript source timestamp for provenance.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Active loops are empty and the stale commitment is listed only as excluded.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: The expired commitment warning preserves the source attribution.
